name: a-csm
description: A-CSM: AI Contextual Signal Matrix — deterministic Node.js pipeline for conversational AI safety risk assessment.

scripts.acsm:run:200: node scripts/acsm-batch-runner.mjs --input config/acsm-batch-input.200.sample.json --config config/acsm-orchestrator.json --output logs/acsm-batch-200-result.json --format both --max-cases 200
scripts.tag:check: node scripts/tag-escalation.mjs --input config/tag-policy-input.sample.json --config config/tag-policy.json --format both --output logs/tag-escalation-result.json
scripts.derive:ps: node scripts/ps-sub-fe-core.mjs --input config/ps-sub-fe-input.sample.json --config config/ps-sub-fe-core.json --format both --output logs/ps-sub-fe-result.json
scripts.deid:check: node scripts/deid-pipeline.mjs --input config/deid-input.sample.json --config config/deid-policy.json --format both --output logs/deid-result.json
scripts.events:check: node scripts/event-engine-v1.mjs --input config/event-engine-input.sample.json --config config/event-engine-v1.json --format both --output logs/event-engine-result.json
scripts.schema:check: node scripts/schema-invariant-service.mjs --input config/schema-invariant-input.sample.json --config config/schema-invariant-service.json --output logs/schema-invariant-result.json --format both
scripts.ledger:check: node scripts/ledger-repeat-engine.mjs --input config/ledger-repeat-input.sample.json --config config/ledger-repeat-engine.json --output logs/ledger-repeat-result.json --format both
scripts.vcd:check: node scripts/vcd-inference.mjs --input config/vcd-input.sample.json --config config/vcd-inference.json --format both --output logs/vcd-inference-result.json
